container.description: Specifies the container definition, including the image, model data, and environment variables required for the SageMaker model.
container.type: list(object({container_hostname: optional(string),environment: optional(map(string)),image: optional(string),inference_specification_name: optional(string),mode: optional(string),model_data_url: optional(string),model_package_name: optional(string),image_config: list(object({repository_access_mode: string,repository_auth_config: list(object({repository_credentials_provider_arn: string}))})),model_data_source: list(object({s3_data_source: list(object({compression_type: string,s3_data_type: string,s3_uri: string,model_access_config: list(object({accept_eula: bool}))}))})),multi_model_config: list(object({model_cache_setting: optional(string)}))}))

enable_network_isolation.description: Specifies whether the model's container has no inbound or outbound network access. Set to true for network isolation.

execution_role_arn.description: ARN of the IAM role that SageMaker assumes to access resources during model deployment.

inference_execution_config.description: Configuration for controlling the execution behavior of the inference container, including settings for model optimization and performance.

name.description: Unique name for the SageMaker model; must be between 1 and 63 characters, and can include alphanumeric characters and hyphens.

primary_container.description: Defines the primary container configuration for the model, including the image, environment variables, and model data location.
primary_container.type: list(object({container_hostname: optional(string),environment: optional(map(string)),image: optional(string),inference_specification_name: optional(string),mode: optional(string),model_data_url: optional(string),model_package_name: optional(string),image_config: list(object({repository_access_mode: string,repository_auth_config: list(object({repository_credentials_provider_arn: string}))})),model_data_source: list(object({s3_data_source: list(object({compression_type: string,s3_data_type: string,s3_uri: string,model_access_config: list(object({accept_eula: bool}))}))})),multi_model_config: list(object({model_cache_setting: optional(string)}))}))

tags.description: Key-value pairs to associate with the SageMaker model for resource categorization and identification.

vpc_config.description: Configuration details for the VPC, including subnets and security groups, used to control network access to the model.
